headingOptions: Ferro Manganese for the World's Steel

overview.intro:
Hira Electro Smelters Limited (HESL) is an integrated ferro alloys manufacturer supplying High Carbon, Medium Carbon, and Low Carbon Ferro Manganese to steel producers and industrial consumers across India and 26 countries worldwide. Strategically located near Visakhapatnam Port in Andhra Pradesh and backed by the wider Hira Group ecosystem, we operate at the intersection of manufacturing scale, metallurgical capability, and export-ready infrastructure.

One facility. Full integration.
Built to deliver across grades and geographies.
highlights: 83,682 MT Annual Ferro Alloys Manufacturing Capacity
Star Export House Recognised Export Status
Largest Indian Producer of MC & LC FeMn

efficiency.heading: Efficient by Design
efficiency.description: Our manufacturing approach is built around efficient operations, process discipline, and responsible resource use. This enables us to strengthen production consistency, improve operational reliability, and support cost-efficient Ferro Manganese manufacturing.

items.title: High Carbon Ferro Manganese (HC FeMn)
items.description: The backbone of ferro alloy consumption worldwide and the starting point for manganese addition in steelmaking.

items.title: Medium Carbon Ferro Manganese (MC FeMn)
items.description: Refined ferro manganese grade designed for steel applications requiring balanced carbon levels and improved compositional control.

items.title: Low Carbon Ferro Manganese (LC FeMn)
items.description: Speciality ferro alloy developed for high-grade steel production where lower carbon content and tighter metallurgical parameters are essential.

items.title: Ferro Manganese Slag
items.description: A process-derived material generated during ferro alloys production and utilised across industrial and recovery-based applications.

items.title: MOX Dust
items.description: Manganese oxide-rich by-product recovered during manufacturing and used in downstream industrial applications.

items.title: Rejected Slag Dust
items.description: Recovered process residue is redirected for industrial use to optimise material utilisation throughout the production cycle.

blocks.title: ISO 9001:2015 Certified Operations
blocks.description: Certified for the manufacturing and supply of ferro alloys, supporting structured quality management across operations.

blocks.title: Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) Certification
blocks.description: Certified under IS 1171:2021 standards for Ferro Manganese, supporting product quality and compliance across manufacturing operations.

blocks.title: In-House Quality Control Laboratory
blocks.description: Dedicated laboratory and inspection systems supporting composition testing and process monitoring across production stages.

queryForm.heading:
Have a Business Requirement or Query?
Our team will reach out to you at the earliest.

high-carbon-ferro-manganese.overview: The most widely produced ferro alloy globally, High Carbon Ferro Manganese is smelted directly from manganese ore in our Submerged Arc Furnaces. It serves as the primary manganese additive in steelmaking, functioning as a deoxidiser that also enhances hardness, tensile strength, and abrasion resistance in the finished steel.

applications.title: Steel Manufacturing
applications.description: Used across carbon steel and alloy steel manufacturing processes.

applications.title: Deoxidation
applications.description: Supports the removal of oxygen during steelmaking operations.

applications.title: Alloy Strengthening
applications.description: Improves the hardness, strength, and wear resistance of steel.

applications.title: Industrial Steel Applications
applications.description: Used across infrastructure, engineering, automotive, and industrial steel segments.

medium-carbon-ferro-manganese.overview: Medium Carbon Ferro Manganese is a refined ferro alloy produced through further processing of High Carbon Ferro Manganese in our Argon Oxygen Decarburisation converter. The controlled decarburisation process reduces carbon content while preserving manganese concentration, delivering an alloy that offers a balanced combination of ductility, strength, and metallurgical consistency for more demanding steel applications.

applications.title: Special Steel Manufacturing
applications.description: Used across special steel applications requiring controlled carbon composition and improved metallurgical consistency.

applications.title: High-Strength Low-Alloy (HSLA) Steel
applications.description: Supports the production of HSLA steels designed for improved strength-to-weight performance and structural reliability.

applications.title: Tool Steel Applications
applications.description: Used in tool steel manufacturing, where balanced hardness, toughness, and alloy control are important.

applications.title: Automotive & Engineering Components
applications.description: Suitable for automotive and engineering applications, including gears, shafts, and components requiring durability and wear resistance.

low-carbon-ferro-manganese.overview: The most refined grade in our product portfolio, Low Carbon Ferro Manganese, is produced through extended Argon Oxygen Decarburisation refining to achieve very low carbon levels while maintaining a high manganese concentration. This grade is used in steel applications where tighter carbon control is essential to achieving specific metallurgical and performance requirements.

applications.title: Stainless Steel Production
applications.description: Used in stainless steel manufacturing processes requiring lower residual carbon levels and controlled alloy composition.

applications.title: Special Alloy Steels
applications.description: Supports specialised alloy steel applications where tighter metallurgical control is essential.

applications.title: Corrosion-Resistant Materials
applications.description: Suitable for high-performance materials designed for corrosion resistance and long-term operational reliability.

applications.title: Tool Steel & Precision Applications
applications.description: Used across tool steel and precision engineering applications requiring controlled carbon content and consistent metallurgical properties.

byProducts.overview:
Efficiency is built through how consistently an operation performs, how intelligently its resources are used, and how well each stage of production is connected.
At HESL, this thinking is built into the design of our plant and strengthened through disciplined execution across operations. With planned infrastructure, controlled processes, and a strong focus on resource utilisation, we have created a structural cost advantage that supports one of the lowest production costs per metric tonne of Ferro Manganese in the Indian industry.

blocks.title: Linear Plant Layout
blocks.description: All 5 furnaces and the AOD converter are aligned within a single operating flow, reducing unnecessary handling and liquid-metal transfer time. This supports better heat retention, smoother refining, improved metal recovery, and lower energy costs per tonne of refined alloy.

blocks.title: Lowest Specific Power Consumption
blocks.description: We operate at one of the lowest power-consumption levels per MT of Ferro Manganese in India. Use of Variable Frequency Drives (VFDs) on select continuous-duty motors, supported by regular energy audits, helps optimise power use across operations and eliminate further inefficiencies.

blocks.title: High Manganese Recovery
blocks.description: Strong manganese recovery improves output from the same raw material input. Our Submerged Arc Furnace (SAF) operations achieve 80–85% manganese recovery, while Argon Oxygen Decarburisation (AOD) operations exceed 95%, supporting both yield and cost efficiency.

blocks.title: 98%+ Plant Availability
blocks.description: Preventive maintenance and critical spare planning help reduce avoidable downtime and support annual plant availability of over 98%. This enables more consistent production and better utilisation of fixed infrastructure.

blocks.title: Port-Proximate Raw Material Control
blocks.description: Located around 120 km from Visakhapatnam Port, HESL benefits from lower raw material movement costs and stronger logistics control. A dedicated team at the port also helps monitor the quality of incoming ore before dispatch to the plant.

blocks.title: Automated AOD Operations
blocks.description: Our Argon Oxygen Decarburisation (AOD) converter operates in fully automatic mode, supported by SOPs developed through in-house R&D, enabling better process control, consistent grade output, and reduced dependence on manual intervention.

byProducts.byProductsIntro:
Materials that Extend Our Efficiency
In our integrated manufacturing system, efficiency continues beyond the main product stream. Materials generated during production are handled as part of our broader resource utilisation approach, supporting industrial applications while improving overall material efficiency.

items.title: Ferro Manganese Slag
items.intro: Ferro Manganese Slag is a dense material generated during the smelting process as molten ferro manganese is tapped from the Submerged Arc Furnace. Its mineral composition confers physical and chemical properties that are actively sought by several downstream industries, especially for applications that require manganese-bearing material.

applications.title: Industrial Processing
applications.description: Used across industrial operations requiring manganese-bearing process material.

applications.title: Road Construction & Infrastructure
applications.description: Used as an aggregate material in road base and sub-base layers, valued for its density, hardness, and load-bearing characteristics

applications.title: Cement & Construction Materials
applications.description: Used as a supplementary raw material in cement manufacturing, contributing to mineral composition and reducing dependence on virgin raw materials

applications.title: Secondary Manganese Recovery
applications.description: Processed as feedstock in secondary smelting operations to recover residual manganese content, particularly in markets where manganese ore is scarce or expensive

applications.title: Land Reclamation & Fill Material
applications.description: Used in controlled fill applications where material density and stability are required

items.title: MOX Dust
items.intro: MOX Dust is a fine, manganese oxide-rich powdered material captured from the furnace off-gas during high-temperature smelting operations in the submerged arc furnace. It is captured through our pollution control and dust recovery systems for utilisation across select industrial and downstream process applications.

applications.title: Secondary Smelting & Ferro Alloy Production
applications.description: Used as a supplementary manganese source in smelting operations, blended with primary ore to enhance furnace charge composition

applications.title: Mineral Processing & Recovery
applications.description: Processed through hydrometallurgical or pyrometallurgical routes to extract manganese content for chemical or metallurgical applications

applications.title: Industrial Chemical Production
applications.description: Production of dry cell batteries, fertilisers, and chemical compounds, where manganese is a required input.

items.title: Rejected Slag Dust
items.intro: Rejected Slag Dust is a fine-grained material derived during slag crushing and sizing. It supports suitable downstream applications where slag-based mineral content can be productively used.

applications.title: Construction Material Use
applications.description: Used in construction-related applications, including aggregate and road-base material, subject to suitability and customer requirements.

applications.title: Cement & Binder Applications
applications.description: Used in cement or binder-related applications depending on composition, processing, and end-use specifications.

applications.title: Industrial Processing
applications.description: Suitable for downstream industrial processes where slag-based mineral material can be further handled, processed, or blended.
